title: A Resolution Authorizing the Municipal Government of Los Baños (MGLB) through the Local Chief Executive Honorable Neil Andrew N. Nocon to accept the donation being made by the Philippine Amusement and Gaming Corporation (PAGCOR), a government owned and controlled corporation with address at MET Live Building Central Business Park 1-A Macapagal Boulevard Cor. Edsa Extension, Pasay City, Philippines, for One (1) Unit of Patient Transport Vehicle.
